message:
fix(macros): improve to_snake_case for acronym boundaries and clean up dead code

The to_snake_case function previously inserted underscores before every
uppercase letter, producing incorrect results for acronym sequences like
"HTTPStatus" -> "h_t_t_p_status". Now correctly handles acronym
boundaries by checking adjacent character casing, yielding
"HTTPStatus" -> "http_status".

Also removes two instances of dead code:
- Unused `variants` binding in SqlType::Enum match arm (was immediately
  discarded with `let _ = variants`)
- Unused `_variant_count` variable in generate_sql_enum_impl

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
